title: Ordinamenti għad-Diploma in Diplomatic Studies taħt il-patroċinju tal-Mediterranean Academy of Diplomatic Studies
title_en: Ordinamenti għad-Diploma in Diplomatic Studies taħt il-patroċinju tal-Mediterranean Academy of Diplomatic Studies
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/327.277/mlt, expression eli/sl/327.277/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 207 ta’ l-2005, kif emendat bl-Avvi\ Legali 111 ta’ l2008
provisions.content:
(1) It-titolu ta’ dawn l-ordinamenti hu l-Ordinamenti g]adDiploma in Diplomatic Studies ta]t il-patro`inju tal-Mediterranean
Academy of Diplomatic Studies.

Titolu u tifsir.

(2) F’dawn l-ordinamenti, kemm-il darba r-rabta tal-kliem ma
te]tie[x mod ie]or "il-Bord" tfisser il-Bord tal-Mediterranean Academy of
Diplomatic Studies;
"id-Diploma" tfisser id-Diploma in Diplomatic Studies; u
"il-kors" tfisser il-programm ta’ studji li jwassal g]ad-Diploma
in Diplomatic Studies.

provisions.title: Titolu u tifsir
provisions.content:
Dawn l-ordinamenti g]andhom japplikaw g]all-korsijiet li
jibdew f’Ottubru 2008 jew wara.

Applikabilità.
Emendat:
A.L. 111 ta’ l-2008.

provisions.title: Titolu u tifsir
provisions.content:
Biex ikunu rre[istrati b]ala studenti regolari fil-kors, lapplikanti g]andhom jissodisfaw ir-rekwi\iti [enerali g]ad-d]ul
kif spe`ifikat fir-Regolamenti g]ad-D]ul ta’ l-Università.

Rekwi\iti g]add]ul.

provisions.title: Rekwi\iti g]add]ul
provisions.content:
Il-kors jestendi fuq medda ta’ sentejn ta’ studju fuq ba\i
part-time.

provisions.title: Tul tal-kors
provisions.content:
Il-kors g]andu jkun mag]mul minn taqsimiet studju
mg]allma li g]alihom hemm assenjati total ta’ 60 kredtu.

Programm tal-kors.
Sostitwit:
A.L. 111 ta’ l-2008.

provisions.title: Programm tal-kors
provisions.content:
L-istudenti li jiksbu t-30 kredtu assenjati g]all-Ewwel
Sena u jag]\lu li ma jkomplux g]at-Tieni Sena tal-kors jew li
jonqsu milli jiksbu d-Diploma, ikunu eli[ibbli g]all-g]oti tasCertificate in Diplomatic Studies.

Progress.
Sostitwit:
A.L. 111 ta’ l-2008.

provisions.title: Progress
provisions.content:
L-ismijiet ta’ l-istudenti li jikkwalifikaw g]all-g]oti tadDiploma g]andhom ikunu ppubblikati f ’lista f ’ordni alfabetiku
kklassifikati kif [ej:

Klassifika tarRikonoxximent.

G]adda b’Distinzjoni
G]adda.
